headline: Morgan Stanley Lowers Price Target on Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA), Keeps Overweight Rating
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) is included among the Dividend Capture Strategy: 14 High Yield Stocks to Buy in April. Top 100 Places Where the Rich People Own Real Estate On March 26, Morgan Stanley analyst Adam Kramer lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) to $153.50 from $156. It reiterated […]
